description.value:
Peace-vows taught by valley mediators — Sommerdalsmål valley mediators carry blades that are sworn never to deal the killing blow in anger; the vow is in the hilt-wrap, and the weapon remembers it even in the hands of someone else.

Effect: Once per respite, when you reduce a creature to 0 Stamina with a strike from this weapon, you can choose to spare them — they fall unconscious rather than becoming dying or dead. The Director determines the creature's condition and how long unconsciousness lasts.

Rules: Stamina; Dying; Respite.

project.prerequisites: A weapon of exceptional quality; a peace-vow cord woven by a Sommerdalsmål mediator and tied around the grip
